metadata.description: OIDC client secret for the SvelteKit app
Service API Key for internal service authentication
GitHub Container Registry token (optional, for private images)
Devin organization ID used by the bridge function (optional)
Devin API key/token used by the bridge function (optional)
Shared webhook token used between Azure Monitor and bridge function (optional)
Container image tag to deploy (e.g. latest, branch-name)
Devin organization ID used to construct the sessions API endpoint
Application Insights connection string for Function telemetry
Devin API key/token (optional depending on Devin API setup)
Shared token expected from Azure Monitor webhook query string

variables.registryAppSettings: [if(not(empty(parameters('registryPassword'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}', parameters('registryServer'))), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_USERNAME', 'value', parameters('registryUsername')), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_PASSWORD', 'value', parameters('registryPassword'))), createArray())]

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage', 'value', format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};AccountKey={1};EndpointSuffix={2}', variables('storageAccountName'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value, environment().suffixes.storage)), createObject('name', 'FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME', 'value', 'dotnet-isolated'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_ENABLE_APP_SERVICE_STORAGE', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_ENABLE_CI', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'DEVIN_ORG_ID', 'value', parameters('devinOrgId')), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'DEVIN_API_KEY', 'value', parameters('devinApiKey')), createObject('name', 'ALERT_WEBHOOK_TOKEN', 'value', parameters('alertWebhookToken'))), variables('registryAppSettings'))]

metadata.description: Log Analytics workspace resource ID used by Application Insights
Webhook URL that starts a Devin session

properties.description: Triggers Devin session webhook when Application Insights exceptions are detected.

metadata.description: Name of the Container Apps Environment
Location for the Container Apps Environment

realmImportJson.value: [replace(replace(replace(replace(variables('rawRealmJson'), '"http://localhost:5173/*", "http://localhost:5227/*"', format('"http://localhost:5173/*", "http://localhost:5227/*", "https://{0}/*"', format('{0}-app.{1}', variables('prefix'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'container-apps-env'), '2025-04-01').outputs.defaultDomain.value))), '"http://localhost:5173", "http://localhost:5227"', format('"http://localhost:5173", "http://localhost:5227", "https://{0}"', format('{0}-app.{1}', variables('prefix'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'container-apps-env'), '2025-04-01').outputs.defaultDomain.value))), '"http://localhost:5173/*##http://localhost:5227/*"', format('"http://localhost:5173/*##http://localhost:5227/*##https://{0}/*"', format('{0}-app.{1}', variables('prefix'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'container-apps-env'), '2025-04-01').outputs.defaultDomain.value))), '"secret": "dev-client-secret"', format('"secret": "{0}"', variables('effectiveOidcClientSecret')))]

metadata.description: Name of the Keycloak Container App

containers.name: [parameters('name')]
containers.command: [if(not(empty(parameters('realmImportJson'))), createArray('/bin/sh', '-c', '/opt/keycloak/bin/kc.sh import --dir /opt/keycloak/data/import --override true && exec /opt/keycloak/bin/kc.sh start'), createArray('/opt/keycloak/bin/kc.sh', 'start'))]

metadata.description: Name of the Database Seeder Job

configuration.secrets: [concat(if(not(empty(parameters('registryServer'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'registry-password', 'value', parameters('registryPassword'))), createArray()), createArray(createObject('name', 'customer-connection', 'value', parameters('customerConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'risk-connection', 'value', parameters('riskConnectionString'))))]

metadata.description: Name of the RabbitMQ Container App
